text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

text:
Please don't waste your hard-earned money by buying products from this company. Worst product, worst service
They don't have their own service center, and through a third party, they provide the service.
The toll-free number will work, and the representative will always try to tell you that someone from the team will call you regarding your issue, and you will wait, but no call will come from their end.
Once you open the support ticket on their portal(through App), no one from the service center or carrier company will call you( they have their SLA for 24 to 48 hours, but it is just for saying that no one follows that SLA in this company).
I am highly disappointed with the service and support provided by Carrier Midea India Pvt. Limited.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."
raw:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers
raw:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier. After just 2 years, my AC developed repeated indoor coil leakage due to what appears to be very poor quality copper piping. This led to recurring gas leakage, repeated repair costs, and constant inconvenience.

What was even worse was the after-sales support. Despite multiple escalations, there was no meaningful response or permanent resolution from the company. I even asked if I could purchase a new coil or indoor unit directly from them, but received no proper support.

For a reputed brand, this level of product quality and customer service is unacceptable. Customers should not face major coil failure in just 2 years.

Would not recommend Carrier products based on this experience. Think twice before buying.

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier AC and their local service franchise in Mumbai.

I purchased a Carrier XCEL EDGE FXI(M) (5 Star Inverter) 1 Ton AC in April 2025. The AC is decent, but the customer service is a disaster.

A technician named Zohan called us for servicing. Without any explanation, he asked for an OTP and then used it to cancel the service request without doing any work. He never told us what the OTP was for, and the visit got wasted. This is highly unethical behavior.

We've had to follow up repeatedly just to get basic service. It's been mentally exhausting dealing with such careless and untrained staff.

Carrier must seriously evaluate its franchise partners and field technicians. If this is the level of support you're offering, you're bound to lose loyal customers.

❗ I do not recommend Carrier AC to anyone unless their customer service improves drastically.

text:
Warning: Dangerous Experience with Carrier 2024 AI Flexicool AC

The indoor unit of my Carrier 2024 AI Flexicool AC suddenly burst into flames inside my home in Chennai, Perungalathur, causing a fire and property damage worth ₹5,00,000. The AC is less than a year old. This incident was extremely dangerous and could have caused serious injury or worse.

Customer support from both the Carrier AC team and their service support team has been appalling. Despite filing a complaint (CSR No: 447/2025) and a police report, there has been no proper response or resolution for over a month. The assigned service personnel were delayed, unhelpful, and shockingly rude and careless.

I have also sent multiple emails to Carrier, but there has been no reply or acknowledgment. This level of negligence is unacceptable.

This has been a deeply unsafe and traumatic experience. I strongly advise others not to waste their money on Carrier ACs. Safety and responsible customer service should never be compromised.

---

This has been a deeply unsafe and traumatic experience. I strongly advise others not to waste their money on Carrier ACs. Safety and responsible customer service should never be compromised.

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier AC and their local service franchise in Mumbai.

I purchased a Carrier XCEL EDGE FXI(M) (5 Star Inverter) 1 Ton AC in April 2025. The AC is decent, but the customer service is a disaster.

A technician named Zohan called us for servicing. Without any explanation, he asked for an OTP and then used it to cancel the service request without doing any work. He never told us what the OTP was for, and the visit got wasted. This is highly unethical behavior.

We've had to follow up repeatedly just to get basic service. It's been mentally exhausting dealing with such careless and untrained staff.

Carrier must seriously evaluate its franchise partners and field technicians. If this is the level of support you're offering, you're bound to lose loyal customers.

❗ I do not recommend Carrier AC to anyone unless their customer service improves drastically.

text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

text:
Please don't waste your hard-earned money by buying products from this company. Worst product, worst service
They don't have their own service center, and through a third party, they provide the service.
The toll-free number will work, and the representative will always try to tell you that someone from the team will call you regarding your issue, and you will wait, but no call will come from their end.
Once you open the support ticket on their portal(through App), no one from the service center or carrier company will call you( they have their SLA for 24 to 48 hours, but it is just for saying that no one follows that SLA in this company).
I am highly disappointed with the service and support provided by Carrier Midea India Pvt. Limited.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

Very bad experience,  I purchased one window ac in Aug. 2019 and gas leaked in just one month.
I force them to replace ac but they take 1.5 month to replace and get the replacement by end Oct 2019.  I run that ac for 1day  just to check that new Ac as the winter season started, I didn't get time to run that before may 2020. So again when I start again in summer of 2020 it run for 2month then again gas leaked from ac.  Technician come and we found 3 Leakage in condenser pipe line... Technician weld joints and fit it again..  But again it leak in half an hour....  Really it's a horrible experience.. Please do not purchase this...

I have purchased an AC of carrier midea, now it is in under Amc.  I have lodge a Complaint on 29-05-2020.  Despite of repeated calls no one came to see.  Suddenly Complaint was closed on 8-06-2020 without any reason😢. Now I have lodged complaint again on 9-06-2020.  Let's see what happens now. But I will advise to all please please please do not buy carrier midea product.Very very very bad service 😡
I filed a case against the carrier midea in the consumer court of sainy enclave . I won the case. On 4 February 2025, the court ordered the carrier midea India pvt. Ltd.company to pay a fine of Rs 5000 and Rs 2500 as expenses and ordered to repair the AC and bring the same to the functional stage 👍🏽

text: There is tremendous discrepancy in what the customer service says about pricing and what the service centre quotes. The customer has to then haggle with the on-site service officials, who talk wayy to rudely and harshly, in loud voices when they are told that the service prices quoted to us by the company were less than what they are demanding. This is intolerable. We as customers should not be misled this way. The company officials, who themselves do not know about service charges, leave the customer confused and irritated by the end of the entire ordeal. Its a huge wastage of time, having to sit on calls continuously with the centres and then having officials tell you different things each time you try to rectify.

text:
Took 9 commercial ductile air conditioners for 4 restaurants of mine all of which have completely stopped working within one year of installation. There goes approximately 9 lakh rupees of mine. Service was never provided afyer installation. Either comoressors have stopped working or the coil has completely deformed.
Sarv airtech was the company which sold and installed the ACs and promised the support. Company's owner, salesman, installation guy turned out to be scammers after the AC was sold.
Would never recommend their ACs. When carrier was alone there then the ACs were good. Now its all rubbish.

text:
Pathetic service by carrier's authorised dealer S squer jasola,last yeary actually was in warranty so servicing was free and this year when I raised a request for servicing executive gagan from S Squer authorised service partner gave me quotation of approx 3500 for service n gas leakage and coating.i agreed and AC was picked up from my place I gave 2500 advance,a day later I receive a call saying parts are not repairable we need to change it and total cost is 9100/- on questioning they arranges a call back and
Today receives a call saying it will cost you 7500+taxes.
No prices are fixed randomly asking for whatever.ac actual cost is 22000 and one has to pay 9100 fir servicing with in 2yr.
On saying that I don't want to get it repaired from them Mr gagan (manager ) from S squer jasola told me travelling and service will be charged where in I was not informed about it earlier.
They have calls recorded in call center they can check for reference,when IAM not getting my account repaired why should I pay the service charge.
Mr gagan was very rude And continuously arguing for no reason when I have decided on don't want your services then matter ends here.advance paid is not getting refunded as informed by mr gagan.and my account is still not deleversd to my place.

For no service I have paid 2500 .
This is cheating and within 2 year if a consumer have to pay 9100 for servicing then I guess better opt for some other brand rather carrier.
Highly disappointed with carrier and their service partner S Squer . unprofessional staff .
Expecting a action in this case.

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text:
Absolutely terrible service. Complete waste of time.

We specifically confirmed with AC Care India / RO Care service a day in advance whether they could send a technician by 8:00 AM, and they explicitly said yes. Trusting their word, we went to the apartment early just to get the work done on time.

Only to later find out that their technicians don’t even start work until after 9:30 AM.

This was never informed to us beforehand. No call, no update, no courtesy message. Just blatant misinformation and zero accountability. They wasted everyone’s time because of their poor communication and unprofessional handling.

Don’t make any payments in advance to them unless someone shows at your place or if the work is done.

If you can’t meet a time commitment, at least be honest about it. Highly unreliable service — would not recommend to anyone.

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier AC and their local service franchise in Mumbai.

I purchased a Carrier XCEL EDGE FXI(M) (5 Star Inverter) 1 Ton AC in April 2025. The AC is decent, but the customer service is a disaster.

A technician named Zohan called us for servicing. Without any explanation, he asked for an OTP and then used it to cancel the service request without doing any work. He never told us what the OTP was for, and the visit got wasted. This is highly unethical behavior.

We've had to follow up repeatedly just to get basic service. It's been mentally exhausting dealing with such careless and untrained staff.

Carrier must seriously evaluate its franchise partners and field technicians. If this is the level of support you're offering, you're bound to lose loyal customers.

❗ I do not recommend Carrier AC to anyone unless their customer service improves drastically.

text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

Please don't waste your hard-earned money by buying products from this company. Worst product, worst service
They don't have their own service center, and through a third party, they provide the service.
The toll-free number will work, and the representative will always try to tell you that someone from the team will call you regarding your issue, and you will wait, but no call will come from their end.

I am highly disappointed with the service and support provided by Carrier Midea India Pvt. Limited.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

This is cheating and within 2 year if a consumer have to pay 9100 for servicing then I guess better opt for some other brand rather carrier.
Highly disappointed with carrier and their service partner S Squer . unprofessional staff .
Expecting a action in this case.

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier. After just 2 years, my AC developed repeated indoor coil leakage due to what appears to be very poor quality copper piping. This led to recurring gas leakage, repeated repair costs, and constant inconvenience.

What was even worse was the after-sales support. Despite multiple escalations, there was no meaningful response or permanent resolution from the company. I even asked if I could purchase a new coil or indoor unit directly from them, but received no proper support.

For a reputed brand, this level of product quality and customer service is unacceptable. Customers should not face major coil failure in just 2 years.

Would not recommend Carrier products based on this experience. Think twice before buying.

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier AC and their local service franchise in Mumbai.

I purchased a Carrier XCEL EDGE FXI(M) (5 Star Inverter) 1 Ton AC in April 2025. The AC is decent, but the customer service is a disaster.

A technician named Zohan called us for servicing. Without any explanation, he asked for an OTP and then used it to cancel the service request without doing any work. He never told us what the OTP was for, and the visit got wasted. This is highly unethical behavior.

We've had to follow up repeatedly just to get basic service. It's been mentally exhausting dealing with such careless and untrained staff.

Carrier must seriously evaluate its franchise partners and field technicians. If this is the level of support you're offering, you're bound to lose loyal customers.

❗ I do not recommend Carrier AC to anyone unless their customer service improves drastically.

text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

text:
Please don't waste your hard-earned money by buying products from this company. Worst product, worst service
They don't have their own service center, and through a third party, they provide the service.
The toll-free number will work, and the representative will always try to tell you that someone from the team will call you regarding your issue, and you will wait, but no call will come from their end.
Once you open the support ticket on their portal(through App), no one from the service center or carrier company will call you( they have their SLA for 24 to 48 hours, but it is just for saying that no one follows that SLA in this company).
I am highly disappointed with the service and support provided by Carrier Midea India Pvt. Limited.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

I have purchased an AC of carrier midea, now it is in under Amc.  I have lodge a Complaint on 29-05-2020.  Despite of repeated calls no one came to see.  Suddenly Complaint was closed on 8-06-2020 without any reason😢. Now I have lodged complaint again on 9-06-2020.  Let's see what happens now. But I will advise to all please please please do not buy carrier midea product.Very very very bad service 😡

Ltd.company to pay a fine of Rs 5000 and Rs 2500 as expenses and ordered to repair the AC and bring the same to the functional stage 👍🏽

text: There is tremendous discrepancy in what the customer service says about pricing and what the service centre quotes. The customer has to then haggle with the on-site service officials, who talk wayy to rudely and harshly, in loud voices when they are told that the service prices quoted to us by the company were less than what they are demanding. This is intolerable. We as customers should not be misled this way. The company officials, who themselves do not know about service charges, leave the customer confused and irritated by the end of the entire ordeal. Its a huge wastage of time, having to sit on calls continuously with the centres and then having officials tell you different things each time you try to rectify.

text:
Took 9 commercial ductile air conditioners for 4 restaurants of mine all of which have completely stopped working within one year of installation. There goes approximately 9 lakh rupees of mine. Service was never provided afyer installation. Either comoressors have stopped working or the coil has completely deformed.
Sarv airtech was the company which sold and installed the ACs and promised the support. Company's owner, salesman, installation guy turned out to be scammers after the AC was sold.
Would never recommend their ACs. When carrier was alone there then the ACs were good. Now its all rubbish.

text:
Pathetic service by carrier's authorised dealer S squer jasola,last yeary actually was in warranty so servicing was free and this year when I raised a request for servicing executive gagan from S Squer authorised service partner gave me quotation of approx 3500 for service n gas leakage and coating.i agreed and AC was picked up from my place I gave 2500 advance,a day later I receive a call saying parts are not repairable we need to change it and total cost is 9100/- on questioning they arranges a call back and
Today receives a call saying it will cost you 7500+taxes.
No prices are fixed randomly asking for whatever.ac actual cost is 22000 and one has to pay 9100 fir servicing with in 2yr.
On saying that I don't want to get it repaired from them Mr gagan (manager ) from S squer jasola told me travelling and service will be charged where in I was not informed about it earlier.
They have calls recorded in call center they can check for reference,when IAM not getting my account repaired why should I pay the service charge.
Mr gagan was very rude And continuously arguing for no reason when I have decided on don't want your services then matter ends here.advance paid is not getting refunded as informed by mr gagan.and my account is still not deleversd to my place.

For no service I have paid 2500 .
This is cheating and within 2 year if a consumer have to pay 9100 for servicing then I guess better opt for some other brand rather carrier.
Highly disappointed with carrier and their service partner S Squer . unprofessional staff .
Expecting a action in this case.

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text:
Extremely disappointing experience with Carrier. After just 2 years, my AC developed repeated indoor coil leakage due to what appears to be very poor quality copper piping. This led to recurring gas leakage, repeated repair costs, and constant inconvenience.

What was even worse was the after-sales support. Despite multiple escalations, there was no meaningful response or permanent resolution from the company. I even asked if I could purchase a new coil or indoor unit directly from them, but received no proper support.

For a reputed brand, this level of product quality and customer service is unacceptable. Customers should not face major coil failure in just 2 years.

Would not recommend Carrier products based on this experience. Think twice before buying.

text:
Warning: Dangerous Experience with Carrier 2024 AI Flexicool AC

The indoor unit of my Carrier 2024 AI Flexicool AC suddenly burst into flames inside my home in Chennai, Perungalathur, causing a fire and property damage worth ₹5,00,000. The AC is less than a year old. This incident was extremely dangerous and could have caused serious injury or worse.

Customer support from both the Carrier AC team and their service support team has been appalling. Despite filing a complaint (CSR No: 447/2025) and a police report, there has been no proper response or resolution for over a month. The assigned service personnel were delayed, unhelpful, and shockingly rude and careless.

I have also sent multiple emails to Carrier, but there has been no reply or acknowledgment. This level of negligence is unacceptable.

This has been a deeply unsafe and traumatic experience. I strongly advise others not to waste their money on Carrier ACs. Safety and responsible customer service should never be compromised.

---

Customer support from both the Carrier AC team and their service support team has been appalling. text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text:
I am writing this review to express my extreme disappointment with Carrier Midea’s service and handling of my AC unit purchased over a year ago via Vijay Sales.

From day one, the AC has had serious performance issues. Despite raising multiple complaints, your authorized service team has failed to provide a resolution. In fact, the unit was taken to your service center and returned in worse condition — the internal panel is missing, and the sensor is completely non-functional (which I’ve documented with images and shared).
Most recently, I received a call from someone who was completely unaware of the situation and asked me to repeat everything from scratch. This reflects a severe lack of coordination, professionalism, and seriousness in handling consumer complaints.

Even after numerous emails, photos, and requests, there has been no meaningful response or corrective action from your side.

I am no longer seeking any support from your end. You've left me no choice but to take legal action through appropriate consumer redressal channels. This experience has caused immense mental frustration and wasted time and money.

Carrier, you have lost a loyal customer, and I will strongly advise others to reconsider buying your products.

text:
Carrier AC — Keeping You “Cool” with Sweat and Frustration Since Forever!

If you’re looking for an air conditioner that definitely won’t cool your room, you’ve come to the right place! I bought a 2-ton Carrier AC that came completely empty — no gas, no cooling, just hot air and heartbreak. Installed it right before a heatwave because who doesn’t love sweating buckets indoors?

The real chill, however, came from their customer service — a masterclass in ignoring calls, passing the buck, and vanishing acts worthy of a magic show. Shoutout to Swarna for at least answering, but the senior team? MIA for over a week. Kuldeep suggested an alternative model that apparently doesn’t exist, and Vickey’s phone might as well be a brick.

Because of them, I got a free sauna experience at home and had to work from home — literally working in my own sweat. Also, massive financial losses because running an office without AC in 45°C isn’t exactly fun.

So if you want your money’s worth and actual cool air — run away. But if you want a wild ride of frustration, broken promises, and sweaty misery, Carrier’s got you covered.

10/10 would not recommend. Would give zero stars if I could.

text:
Indeed, horrible after sales service system and process. Bought 7 ACs (yes it's silly of me to have put all eggs in one basket) just 5 months back, and put it to use for the first time this season. Two of those showed EC problem on first use after the engineers had installed it and left after sweetly taking the happy code.

Called call center, went through IVR, was told will get the ticket number on sms. Made 3 attempts , no sms received.
Tried their suggested whatsapp line. Again went through their menu options 5 times over 2 days, and received each time an apology "come back after some time". Got hold of a service guy who said he will look into the issue and to call again after 10 minutes. He switched off the phone after that.

There is no recourse. No hope. Top Management is either sleeping or incompetent or extremely demotivated or all the above. The only thing certain about them is they are hurting the Carrier Brand, big time.
Meanwhile, I wish I had bought the trouble free Mitsubishis, and super services, irrespective of their price. It would have spared me from all the issues  of Carrier in this terrible summer.

text:
Please don't waste your hard-earned money by buying products from this company. Worst product, worst service
They don't have their own service center, and through a third party, they provide the service.
The toll-free number will work, and the representative will always try to tell you that someone from the team will call you regarding your issue, and you will wait, but no call will come from their end.
Once you open the support ticket on their portal(through App), no one from the service center or carrier company will call you( they have their SLA for 24 to 48 hours, but it is just for saying that no one follows that SLA in this company).
I am highly disappointed with the service and support provided by Carrier Midea India Pvt. Limited.

text:
I am sorry it has come to this. However I feel it would be in the interest of your company and for you to be aware of what I have been made to go through and take appropriate action.

On the 20th of March I filed a service request with your company's customer service helpline for the replenishment of refrigerant gas in One of my 2 Ton Carrier split aircons.

Within a couple of days two service technicians turned up in Carrier uniforms and took a look at the AC unit and confirmed that the gas has indeed leaked and should be refilled. Stating they had no gas with them at the time of the house call they left saying that they would be back soon with it. It must be noted at this time that the original service request was for refilling the gas.

Later another two technicians came with the gas, however one of them was wearing an LG Aircon uniform. When questioned as where they have come from they stated that the Carrier Technicians has asked them to service our AC unit and they worked at a local aircondtioning repair shop. They would be unable to give a carrier receipt for any charges paid.

I then called your call centre and filed another request for refilling the gas. The call centre at time was unaware of the previous complaint and when brought to their notice were unable to answere as to what happened to it. By now about 5 days had passed since the original request was filed

On filing the second request another two technicians turned up and claimed that the refrigerant is R22 which does not exist anymore (on Amazon.in its retailing for about Rs.1000/kg from various retailers and mfgs). And that my  airconditioners should be scrapped and new ones bought and then they promptly left.

I called your service centre again and they confirmed that the refrigerant is available and would cost roughly Rs. 2200 and another Rs.600 for nitrogen gas and off course the service charge.

I accepted all the charges and they said they would despatch a technician soon.

Off course now nobody from your company turned up. I waited another couple of days and then again called up your service centre and talked your escalation team promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again, talked to escalation team manager. Promises were made. Nothing happened.

Called again same promises same result.

I am generally not a person to go off on a rant like this but the disconnect between your company and its customers is astounding. There seems to be no oversight by corporate on its service centre employees, let alone auditing who is actually doing the service on the company's behalf.

I believe this a diservice to your customers

This is cheating and within 2 year if a consumer have to pay 9100 for servicing then I guess better opt for some other brand rather carrier.
Highly disappointed with carrier and their service partner S Squer . unprofessional staff .
Expecting a action in this case.

text:
purchased a Carrier Midea AC and faced a very disappointing service experience.
At the time of purchase, installation was mistakenly not included, so I had to separately contact customer support and raise a request. After multiple follow-ups, the installation was finally completed and I paid ₹1770 for it.
However, even after successful installation, I received a message stating that my service request was cancelled as 'customer declined', which is completely incorrect.
This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

This kind of wrong update in the system can directly affect my product warranty and service history, which is very concerning.
I request the company to immediately correct this issue and ensure my warranty remains valid. Otherwise, this reflects very poor after-sales service."

text:
I bought this Carrier split inverter AC in 2024, and it has been a disappointment since day one. If you are considering buying a Carrier AC, learn from my nightmare and stay away.
The product quality is sub-par, but the service is even worse. My unit was handled by JMD Services Chhatarpur, and they have been a disaster:
• Gross Negligence: During the third service, the technicians actually blew up the PCB. It took them 2 months just to get it replaced.
• Unfair Charges: Right after the PCB was replaced, the AC stopped cooling. They charged me another 4,500 INR to refill the gas. A 2-year-old AC that has barely been used for 5 months should not require a gas refill this indicates either a manufacturing defect or damage caused by their technicians.
• Current Faults: The AC is now displaying a P0 error and making a horrible, loud generator-like sound. It is deafening and clearly a major mechanical or electronic failure.
• Useless Support: When the service guys finally showed up, they claimed they "couldn't find anything" and told me to record a video and call them back later. They are clearly avoiding accountability for a unit they have repeatedly failed to fix.
I have spent more money and stress on repairs than I have actually spent enjoying the cooling. I will never recommend Carrier to anybody. Save your hard-earned money and buy from a brand that actually respects its customers

text: Worst company and worst products. I bought an ac for my office. The ac wasn’t working from day 1 of installation. After weeks of calls and requests they changed the ac and also asked me to get the entire new wiring done on my cost which I did. The new ac unit and wiring also didn’t work and again it took weeks of calls and requests to arrange a technician to visit. This time the gas had leaked there was some blockage in the pipes, on opening the unit half of connections were disconnected and no one knew what to do. Rather sleep under the sun than buy product from this company. I would have given negative rating if that was possible
